announcement.text: Clear skin in as little as 2 weeks —

hero.description: Paramedical skincare backed by 25+ years of medical expertise, European-grade serums, and a proven acne treatment protocol. Real results in as little as 2 weeks.

why.title: A Different Kind of Skincare Practice
why.subtitle: Marta combines medical expertise with personalized care to deliver results that store-bought products can't.

expertise.title: Medical-Grade Expertise
expertise.description: 25+ years of medical background with a B.S. in Biology and A.S. in Lab Sciences. Clinical precision in every consultation.

protocol.description: Face Reality certified under Dr. James E. Fulton, the pioneer of Retin-A. A proven system — not guesswork.

european.title: European-Grade Serums

botanicals.title: Proprietary Botanicals

personalized.title: Personalized Regimens
personalized.description: No two skin types are the same. Every client receives a custom treatment roadmap and take-home protocol.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Care
bilingual.description: Fluent in English and Spanish, ensuring every client feels understood and confident in their treatment plan.

services.title: Expert Skincare Treatments
services.subtitle: From clinical acne programs to luxury Korean facials — every treatment is tailored to your unique skin.
services.pageSubtitle: Every treatment is tailored to your unique skin type and concerns. Marta combines 25+ years of medical expertise with cutting-edge protocols for real results.
services.biWeeklyDesc: Bi-weekly visits over 12 weeks (6 total). Each visit includes progress monitoring and an acne facial to prepare your skin for the next phase of treatment.
services.ctaHeading: Not Sure Which Treatment Is Right?
services.ctaSubtitle: Book a free 15-min chat or a $35 30-min consultation and Marta will design a treatment plan tailored to your unique needs. The consultation is always free for the Acne Treatment Program.

award.description: 360 Radiance has been recognized as the **Best Skin Care Clinic in Sunrise, Florida** by BusinessRate, powered by Google Reviews. This award reflects the trust, satisfaction, and real results our clients experience every day.
award.footer: Powered by Google Reviews · BusinessRate Verified

about.p1: Marta Nazzar is a licensed Paramedical Aesthetician with a B.S. in Biology and A.S. in Medical & Laboratory Studies from Florida College of Natural Health. Her 25+ years of medical background allow her to merge clinical precision with aesthetic artistry.
about.p2: Certified under renowned acne expert Dr. James E. Fulton through the Face Reality program, Marta evaluates diverse skin types to determine the best solution for each individual. She created the Radiance Skin Care Line — botanical formulas free of toxins, parabens, and sulfates.
about.pageSubtitle: 25+ years of medical expertise, a deep passion for skincare science, and a commitment to results that change lives.
about.bioHeading: From Medical Science to Skincare Artistry
about.p3: Certified under renowned acne expert Dr. James E. Fulton through the Face Reality program, Marta evaluates diverse skin types to determine the best solution for each individual. Dr. Fulton pioneered Retin-A — and his clinical protocol is the foundation of Marta's acne treatment approach.
about.p4: She created the Radiance Skin Care Line — a proprietary collection of botanical formulas free of toxins, parabens, and sulfates. Every product blends clinical science with nature's most beneficial ingredients, designed for real skin conditions and real results.
about.p5: Fluent in English and Spanish, Marta ensures every client feels understood and confident in their treatment plan. Her practice isn't just about clearing skin — it's about restoring confidence and changing lives.

scienceFirst.title: Science-First Approach
scienceFirst.desc: Every recommendation is backed by clinical research and 25+ years of medical experience. No trends, no guesswork — just proven results.

personalized.title: Personalized Care
personalized.desc: No two skin types are the same. Every client receives a custom treatment roadmap and take-home protocol designed for their unique needs.

cleanIngredients.title: Clean Ingredients
cleanIngredients.desc: The Radiance line is toxin-free, paraben-free, and sulfate-free. We believe effective skincare should never compromise your health.

longTerm.title: Long-Term Health
longTerm.desc: We treat the root cause, not just symptoms. Our goal is lasting skin health and the confidence that comes with it.

about.ctaSubtitle: Book a free consultation and experience the difference that real expertise makes.

results.title: Your Clear Skin Journey
results.subtitle: What clients typically experience with the Face Reality program — a 12-week / 3-month program with bi-weekly appointments.
results.pageSubtitle: A 12-week / 3-month program with bi-weekly appointments. From your free first consultation to radiant confidence — here's what clients experience with the Face Reality program and our expert treatments.
results.timelineSubtitle: Every client's skin is different, but here's the typical progression: 6 bi-weekly visits over 12 weeks (3 months), starting with a free consultation.
results.beforeAfterSubtitle: Real clients, real results. These transformations were achieved with the 12-week Acne Treatment Program.
results.ctaSubtitle: Most clients see visible improvement within 2 weeks. The acne consultation is always free — book yours today.
results.expectBody: Your journey to clear skin is a 12-week partnership with bi-weekly appointments. Marta guides you every step of the way with professional treatments, custom home-care, and ongoing adjustments based on your skin's response.

expect.item1: Free comprehensive skin analysis at your first visit
expect.item2: 6 bi-weekly professional treatments in-office over 3 months

expect.item4: Progress tracking and regimen adjustments at every visit
expect.item5: Bilingual support in English and Spanish
expect.item6: Ongoing care after clearing for maintenance

results.quote: "After 2 weeks — 50% better. After 2 months — 90%. After 2 years of hiding behind makeup, I can finally go out with clear skin."

products.title: The Radiance Collection
products.description: Every formula is a groundbreaking blend of clinical science with nature's most beneficial botanical ingredients — resulting in healthier, younger-looking skin.
products.pageSubtitle: Proprietary formulas created by Marta Nazzar — blending clinical science with nature's most effective botanical ingredients. Every product is toxin-free, paraben-free, and sulfate-free.
products.matcherSubtitle: Select your primary skin concern and we'll show you the products formulated specifically for you.
products.catalogSubtitle: Browse by category or explore the entire line. Every product is designed to work together.

clinician.title: Clinician-Formulated
clinician.desc: Every product is created by Marta Nazzar — not a marketing team. Formulas are built on 25+ years of medical expertise and real clinical outcomes.

treatmentPaired.title: Treatment-Paired
treatmentPaired.desc: Products are designed to extend and amplify your in-office results. Each is calibrated to work with our professional treatment protocols.

ingredient.title: Ingredient-First
ingredient.desc: We select actives based on clinical research — not trends. European-sourced, glass ampule-sealed, and concentrated for maximum efficacy.

products.ingredientHeading: Why Ingredients Matter More Than Brands

ingredient.p1: The skincare industry spends billions on packaging and marketing. We spend ours on ingredients. Every formula in the Radiance Collection starts with a single question: what does the clinical data say?
ingredient.p2: Our European glass ampule serums contain 4-10x higher concentrations of active ingredients than their retail counterparts. Single-use packaging eliminates oxidation — meaning every drop is as potent as the day it was formulated.
ingredient.p3: We publish every key ingredient and its clinical benefit because we believe informed clients make better skincare decisions. No proprietary blends hiding behind fancy names — just transparent, evidence-based formulas.

products.ctaHeading: Not Sure Which Products Are Right for You?
products.ctaSubtitle: Book a free skin analysis. Marta will design a personalized regimen with products tailored to your skin's specific needs.

booking.title: Ready for Clear, Radiant Skin?
booking.subtitle: Book a free 15-min chat or a $35 30-min consultation with Marta — the consultation is always free for clients booking the Acne Treatment Program. Your personalized treatment roadmap starts with a single conversation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How 360 Radiance Inc collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.intro: 360 Radiance Inc ("360 Radiance," "we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect personal information when you visit 360radianceskincare.com, book an appointment, or otherwise interact with our paramedical skincare clinic in Sunrise, Florida.

infoCollect.heading: Information We Collect
infoCollect.body: We collect information you provide directly: your name, email address, phone number, preferred contact method, and any details about your skin concerns when you submit our contact form, schedule a consultation through Cal.com, or message us via WhatsApp. When you visit our clinic, we may collect health-history information relevant to your treatment (allergies, medications, prior procedures). We also collect limited technical information automatically when you visit our website — IP address, browser type, pages viewed, and referring URL — through standard server logs and privacy-respecting analytics.

howUse.heading: How We Use Your Information
howUse.body: We use your information to respond to inquiries, schedule and confirm appointments, design personalized treatment plans, send appointment reminders, process payments, and comply with health and safety regulations. With your permission, we may also send occasional educational content about skincare. We do not sell your personal information.

sharing.heading: Who We Share Information With
sharing.body: We share information only with service providers that help us operate the business, under contractual confidentiality obligations: Cal.com (appointment scheduling), Resend (transactional email delivery), our payment processor, and our website hosting provider. We may disclose information when required by law, to protect our legal rights, or to respond to a verified legal request.

cookies.heading: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.body: Our website uses essential cookies needed for site functionality and may use privacy-respecting analytics to understand which content is helpful. We do not use third-party advertising cookies. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though some site features may not work as intended.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete personal information we hold about you. California residents have additional rights under the CCPA, including the right to know what personal information we collect and the right to opt out of any sale (we do not sell personal information). To exercise any of these rights, contact us using the information below — we will respond within 30 days.

retention.heading: Data Retention
retention.body: We keep client treatment records for as long as required by Florida health-regulation guidelines for licensed estheticians. Contact-form submissions and marketing data are kept only as long as needed to serve you, and you can request deletion at any time.

security.heading: Security
security.body: We use industry-standard safeguards to protect your information, including encrypted connections (HTTPS) and access controls on stored records. No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, but we take reasonable steps to protect your data.

minors.heading: Minors
minors.body: Clients under 18 must have a parent or legal guardian present at the initial consultation and provide written consent for treatment. We do not knowingly collect personal information online from children under 13.

changes.heading: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent revision. Material changes will be highlighted on this page.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: Questions about this policy or your personal information? Contact 360 Radiance Inc at info@360radianceskincare.com or call (561) 632-8218. Our office is located at 12651 W. Sunrise Blvd, Suite 301, Sunrise, FL 33323.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The rules that govern your use of 360radianceskincare.com and 360 Radiance Inc services.
terms.intro: Welcome to 360 Radiance Inc. By accessing 360radianceskincare.com or booking any service with us, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully — they contain important information about your rights and responsibilities.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By using this website or booking a service, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old (or have parental consent) and agree to be legally bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site or book a service.

services.heading: Services Provided
services.body: 360 Radiance Inc offers paramedical skincare services in Sunrise, Florida, including the Face Reality acne treatment program, facials, microdermabrasion, chemical peels, microneedling, laser treatments, and other professional aesthetician services. All services are provided by Marta Nazzar, a licensed Paramedical Aesthetician, or under her direct supervision. We are not a medical practice and do not provide medical diagnoses or prescriptions.

noMedicalAdvice.heading: Not Medical Advice
noMedicalAdvice.body: Information on this website and provided during consultations is for general educational purposes about skincare, not a substitute for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult a qualified physician or dermatologist for serious skin conditions, medication interactions, or any concern that requires medical care.

booking.heading: Booking, Cancellations & No-Shows
booking.body: Appointments may be booked through our website, Cal.com, by phone, or by WhatsApp. Please give at least 24 hours notice if you need to cancel or reschedule. No-shows or late cancellations may result in a fee at our discretion. The 15-minute quick chat is free. The 30-minute consultation is $35 — and is always free for clients booking the Acne Treatment Program.

contraindications.heading: Contraindications & Disclosures
contraindications.body: You must disclose all medications, recent treatments (including Accutane, Retin-A, Tazorac, Differin, oral or topical antibiotics), allergies, pregnancy status, and relevant health conditions before any treatment. Failure to disclose may put your safety at risk and may result in refusal of service. We reserve the right to decline or modify any treatment based on your health profile.

results.heading: Results Disclaimer
results.body: Skincare results vary from person to person based on skin type, condition severity, adherence to home-care regimens, lifestyle factors, and individual biology. Testimonials, before-and-after photos, and outcome statistics on this site reflect real client experiences but are not a guarantee. We do not guarantee specific results.

payments.heading: Payments & Refunds
payments.body: Payment is due at the time of service unless otherwise agreed in writing. We accept cash and major credit/debit cards. Treatment programs and packages are generally non-refundable once started, though we will work with you in good faith if exceptional circumstances arise. Product purchases may be returned within 14 days if unopened.

ip.heading: Intellectual Property
ip.body: All content on 360radianceskincare.com — including text, images, logos, the Radiance Skin Care Line branding, blog articles, and treatment protocols — is the property of 360 Radiance Inc or its licensors and is protected by U.S. and international copyright and trademark law. You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.

userConduct.heading: Acceptable Use
userConduct.body: You agree not to misuse the website or our services — no scraping, no automated submissions to our contact form, no impersonation, no posting of unlawful or harassing content, and no interference with site security. We may suspend access if these terms are violated.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Services & Links
thirdParty.body: Our site links to and integrates with third-party services (Cal.com for booking, WhatsApp for messaging, Google Maps, Instagram, Facebook). We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or terms of those third parties. Use them at your own risk and review their respective policies.

liability.heading: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by Florida law, 360 Radiance Inc and its owners, employees, and affiliates are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the website or our services. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

indemnity.heading: Indemnification
indemnity.body: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless 360 Radiance Inc from any claim, loss, or damage (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from your violation of these terms, your misuse of our services, or your failure to disclose health information relevant to your treatment.

law.heading: Governing Law & Disputes
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Any dispute shall be resolved exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Broward County, Florida, and you consent to that jurisdiction.

changes.heading: Changes to These Terms
changes.body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent revision. Continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: Questions about these terms? Contact 360 Radiance Inc at info@360radianceskincare.com or call (561) 632-8218. Our office is located at 12651 W. Sunrise Blvd, Suite 301, Sunrise, FL 33323.
